scope: Pass B full-surface expansion: fetched Vercel's complete, official, live OpenAPI 3.x document directly (https://openapi.vercel.sh/, 331 real method+path operations across the entire Vercel platform API, reviewed 2026-07-04). Covered: 5 read streams (deployments plus new cursor-paginated projects/teams/domains, and a fan_out-driven project_env_vars reading every project's environment variables) and 9 write actions across projects, deployments, project domains, and project environment variables. Excluded, all with a real category: single-item detail GETs duplicating an already-covered list stream (duplicate_of); Enterprise/team-admin surfaces - billing, access groups, Secure Compute networking, directory sync/SSO, marketplace integration installation, microfrontends, rolling releases, team membership (requires_elevated_scope); destructive account-wide pause/unpause toggles (destructive_admin); binary payloads - avatar uploads, deployment file contents (binary_payload); and the remaining large surface - Edge Config, log Drains, bulk redirects, deployment Checks, feature flags, webhooks, DNS records, domain-management actions, custom environments, routing rules, rollback/promote, runtime logs, TLS certs, Remote Caching artifacts, deployment aliases - as breadth-vs-cost triage (out_of_scope), the same curated-breadth pattern the bitly Pass B probe golden uses for its ~30-endpoint analytics matrix.

excluded.reason: deployment alias assignment sub-resource, keyed to a specific deployment id with no top-level list endpoint of its own in this pass's stream set; breadth-vs-cost triage
